principle: Set button text to 14-20px, horizontal padding to double the vertical, height 32-40px desktop and 48px minimum on mobile
explanation: X.ux|button_anatomy: text_14-20px; horizontal_padding == 2x_vertical (eg: v:10px -> h:16px+); height: desktop_32-40px + mobile_min_48px; button_height+font_size must_be_round_numbers -> text_centers_correctly; NO:button_32px+font_17px (won't_center) eg: "btn_h:32px_font:17px" >> "btn_h:40px_font:16px_v:10px_h:16px"

principle: Use filled button for primary CTA only, ghost for secondary, text-link for tertiary — align multiple buttons left-to-right by descending importance
explanation: X.ux|button_hierarchy: filled == primary_CTA (one_per_screen); ghost/outlined == secondary; text_link == tertiary; inline_row: left=most_important -> right=cancel; distance_from_reach == lower_prominence; NO:two_filled_buttons_side_by_side NO:cancel_on_the_left eg: "Delete | Cancel" >> "Cancel | Delete (destructive_right)"

principle: Design all five button states as visually distinct and wrap every interactive element including text links in a minimum 44px tall container
explanation: X.ux|button_states: 5_states: enabled + hover + pressed + disabled + loading; each_visually_distinct BUT no_drastic_changes (avoid_visual_noise); tappable_area: ALL_interactive_elements min_44px_height incl_tertiary_links+nav_items; NO:text_link_without_44px_container NO:disabled_same_as_enabled eg: "nav_link_22px_tall" >> "nav_link_in_44px_min-height_container"

principle: Label destructive confirmation buttons with specific verbs — Cancel and Delete not No and Yes
explanation: X.ux|button_copy: text == action_verb NOT device_action; NO:"click_here" (mobile_users_tap); destructive_dialog: "Cancel"+"Delete" NOT "No"+"Yes"; user_must_understand_consequence_without_reading_dialog_title; NO:vague_confirmations NO:"OK"+"Cancel" for_irreversible_actions eg: "No | Yes" >> "Cancel | Delete account"

principle: Place primary CTAs at thumb reach on mobile and keep destructive buttons out of the natural thumb zone
explanation: X.ux|mobile_button_placement: primary_CTA -> bottom_of_screen (thumb_reach); destructive_buttons (delete/unsubscribe/remove) -> top_or_outside_thumb_zone; prevents_accidental_taps; NO:destructive_CTA_at_bottom_center NO:primary_CTA_at_top_of_screen eg: "Delete_button_bottom_center" >> "Delete_top_right + Confirm_bottom"
